  "findings": [
    "Personnel riding in the bucket of heavy equipment (excavator/loader) while work is in progress.",
    "Severe fall and crushing hazard violating basic equipment safety standards."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately order a stand-down of the equipment operation.",
    "Instruct the worker to exit the bucket immediately.",
    "Conduct an on-site safety meeting regarding equipment safety and prohibited practices before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Riding in an equipment bucket is a severe safety violation under OSHA regulations and manufacturer guidelines. It poses an immediate, critical risk of fall, crushing, or death, and must be stopped immediately.",

    "OSHA 1926 Subpart O (1926.602)",
    "OSHA 1926.21(b)(2)"
  ]
